positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a bioluminescent forest scene. The central focus is a majestic, glowing stag whose antlers are interwoven with delicate glowing flora and mist. Foreground elements include stylized, large lily pads with soft internal light, and winding, root-like paths. The background shows dense, stylized foliage rendered with high contrast and deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst), punctuated by vibrant neon accents of electric cyan and lime green. The overall style is modern, clean graphic art, resembling a blend of Art Nouveau and ethereal Japanese woodblock prints, with distinct, sharp silhouettes and a central, balanced composition. Perfect for repeating textile patterns or singular apparel placement. Volumetric lighting, deep shadows, ultra-detailed, vector graphic quality.
negative: blur, grainy, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn, artifacts, abstract, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, ugly, messy, realistic photo, bokeh, depth of field
